Findings.Title: Monthly cost increase exceeds threshold (+$1,240/mo)
Findings.Detail: infracost diff reports +$1240.55/mo from new Standard_D8s_v5 VM scale set in infra/aks.tf.
Findings.Remediation: Right-size the VM SKU or move workload to a lower-cost tier.

Findings.Title: Premium SQL DB DTU tier inflates baseline cost
Findings.Detail: infracost breakdown shows P2 SQL DB at $930/mo for non-prod environment in infra/sql.tf.
Findings.Remediation: Switch non-prod SQL DB to Basic or Standard tier.

Findings.Title: Total monthly estimate within budget envelope
Findings.Detail: infracost total monthly cost $4180.32 is below the $5000 budget gate for the IaC repo.
